title: erodium cicutarium proles fallax
intro: Erodium cicutarium proles fallax, also known as the redstem filaree, is a type of flowering plant in the geranium family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Erodium cicutarium proles fallax include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate menstrual cramps, and act as a natural diuretic, promoting urination and relieving symptoms of urinary tract infections. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
